questions.question:
Given the pseudocode below for the function \( \textbf{remains()} \), which of the following statements is true about the output, if we pass it a positive integer \( n>2 \)?

int remains(int n)
{  
     int x = n;
     for (i=(n-1);i>1;i--)  {
        x = x % i ;
   }
     return x;
}


Programming in C: TIFR CSE 2020 | Part B | Question: 12
options: Output is \( 0 \) only if \( n \) is NOT a prime number
Output is \( 1 \) only if \( n \) is a prime number
